title: Sufi Culture and Literature Master's Degree with/without Thesis Application and Feeds
content:
Sufi Culture and Literature Master's Degree with/without Thesis Application and Feeds

Sufi Culture and Literature Master’s Degree

2022-2023 Spring Semester Online Applications will start on June 2, 2025 Registrations can be made until

via the link below:

https://sis.uskudar.edu.tr/oibs/ina_app/login.aspx

The language of the program is Turkish.

Application Requirements

Candidates who have a

bachelor’s degree

can apply to the program. For those, who studied abroad, it is required to have an equivalency certificate given by YÖK (High Education Board). For the admission of students to master’s program (with thesis), evaluation is made by the ALES score, underInstitute grade point average and written entrance exam score.

ALES is not required for PhD graduates. ALES score is accepted as 75 for PhD degree holders.

Applicants with the title of associate professor or professor are held exempted for the scientific exam.

Quota for the Spring Semester of the 2025-2026 Academic Year

Master’s Degree with thesis      : 15 students

Master’s Degree without thesis : 30 students

Evaluation

Candidates will be ranked according to the scores obtained by taking 50% of the ALES score, 50% of the undergraduate grade score

Registration Process

Students who are eligible to enroll in the program can apply to the Student Affairs between

.

Information on the fees can be obtained from:

https://international.uskudar.edu.tr/en/tuition-fe
